sutta: is also an important suta the buddha amongst what time the celestial coral tree the kovilara parichataka of the devas of the 30 is withered in leave those devas greatly rejoice the celestial coral tree is withered in leave before long now there will be leaf fall and then it continues what time the leaves are falling they greatly rejoice falling are now the leaves shortly now will burgeon every bun what time the buds appear they greatly rejoice now the buds appear soon the shoots will set what time the shoots are set they greatly rejoice now the shoots are set soon will the blossoms form by time the blossoms form they greatly rejoice now the blossoms form soon like the red lotus will the flowers be shaped what time the flowers are shaped like the red lotus they greatly rejoice shaped are the red load shaped like the red lotus are the flowers soon the flowers will be in full bloom what time the kovilara parichataka tree of the devas of the 30 is in full bloom those devas support for 4 divine months at the foot of the celestial tree darling and indulging the 5 pleasures of the senses when the when the celestial tree is in full bloom its effulgence pervades full 50 leagues the perfume is blown before the wind 100 leaks this is the power of the kovy lara parichataka tree
commentary: i just stopped here to commend this is the tawatimsa heaven the heaven of the 33 there is a special tree there called the kovilara parichataka trila the celestial coral tree and once in a heavenly year a celestial year this tree will blossom and bring forth flowers and then for 4 months when the flowers are in bloom these devas and their world enjoy themselves to enjoy themselves under this tree indulging in all the sensual pleasures and it is because of this tree that the asuras the asuras were formerly also in this 33 in the heaven of the 33 this tava timsa heaven but because the asuras they like to drink liquor and become drunk and fight now so 1 day when they were drunk saka devaraja and his devas took these drunken asuras and threw them down from that heaven into the ocean and so once a year when this celestial coral trees in full bloom they remember that they used to enjoy themselves under this tree and because they were angry they haven't been thrown out of the heaven once a year they will go up to the tawatimsa heaven and fight with saka devaraja and this story about the devas fighting is found in buddhism it is also found in the christian religion where they say michael the angel fought with satan and is also found in the hindu religion this day was fighting i suppose their origin is here then the buddha said in just the same way monks what time the aryan disciple minds himself to go forth from the home into the homeless life the aryan disciple is withered in leave like the celestial corolla tree of the devas of the 30 what time the aryan disciple has his hair and beard shaved off and dawned the yellow robe and gone forth from home into the homeless life is his fall of leave like the celestial colored tree what time alou from sense desires he enters and abides in the first jana his buds appear like the celestial coral tree what time stilling applied and sustained thought he enters and abides in the second genre his shoots set like the celestial coral tree what time with the fading away of delight he enters and abides in the third ghana his blossoms form like the celestial coral tree what time with the abandoning of bodily pleasure he enters and abides in the fourth ghana his flowers are of the red lotus shape like the celestial coral tree what time the aryan disciple by destroying the asavas enters and abides in full realization his flowers are in full bloom like the celestial coral tree of the devas of the 30 then the earth devas after a shout this reverencer called so and so living the life of faith of such a reverent 1 gone forth from such a village or market town has destroyed the earth of us and dwells in full realization hearing the shout of the earth devas the company of the 4 royal devas shout and similarly the devas of the 30 the yama devas the tusita devas the devas who delight in creating the devas who have power over others creations and the devas of brahma's retinue roll back the cry this reverencer living the life of faith gone forth from such a village or from such a market town into the homeless life has by the destruction of the asavas entered and there abides in that state of emancipation by mind and wisdom which is free of the ask of us having come to know and realize this state fully for himself even in this present life thus in an instant thus in a moment the sound source up to the brahma's heavens this is the progressive power of a monk who has destroyed the earth of us so you see here is a very interesting simile where the buddha gave a comparison of a monk who cultivates the holy life and attains the arahant and it is clear from here that to attain arahan what is very important are the attainment of the jhanas just like the flower blooming step by step so having gone forth now he attains the first jhana then the second jana and the third and the fourth and after attaining the fourth jhana he destroys the asavas so you see here the attainment of janus can be seen to be very important and the final attainment of destruction of the arthras or the final attainment of liberation is like the blossoming of the celestial coral tree flower in this case it is the blossoming of the flower of wisdom and the flower of wisdom just like the heavenly flower goes through the steps of renouncing him among a person renouncing the home life to be homeless renuncian and then against the jaanas 1 by 1 until the full destruction of the ah savasana so from here we also can see the importance the buddha puts on the uh the janus you note very carefully here this is very unlike the commentaries where the commentaries talk about the niana's attainment of the nyanas for full enlightenment here the buddha is talking about attainment of the janas which is quite different nowhere in the sutas do you find the buddha talks talks about attainment of nianas the but the buddha always is talking about the attainment of the janus as definite requirements to enlightenment the next suta is
